summary: The hinted representative #48404 is already closed, so it is kept only as historical evidence. #60670 is the only live non-security CLI segfault report and should remain open as the current canonical issue for that narrow symptom family. #63740 is not a duplicate; hydrated comments make it security-sensitive, so it is routed to central security triage without poisoning the non-security item.

actions.reason: Already-closed representative cannot be used as the live canonical for autonomous duplicate closeout.
